title: Coordinates in nether
description: This plugin allows you to find out the coordinates in hell using the command
body:
This plugin converts the coordinates of the ordinary world you set into the coordinates of hell, which helps you navigate when building farms and roads. 
In order to change something, the cordinate needs to know that:
/nether x and z, where x and z are cordinates.
There is also an alternative command:
/nh x and z
![/nh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd8045408a06acab938768f7b89190319f4b6996.png)

There is also a command:
/coords 
Which translates the coordinates on which
the player stands to the coordinates of hell

![/coords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0de822408b36f3b5d305b8aaffb3706faa145d36.png)


**IMPORTANT**! Do not confuse these two commands
